results.name: judoon
results.description: Rhino-like alien mercenaries with a reputation for overzealousness.

results.name: jump
results.description: A creature gains flying until end of turn.

results.name: jund goblin
results.description: Goblins from the Jund shard of Alara, mostly dragon fodder

results.name: jurassic park dilophosaurus
results.description: Any depiction of a dilophosaurus that resembles Jurassic Park's genetically modified dilophosaurus rather than actual dilophosaurus fossils.

results.name: kaldheim
results.description: IT'S COLD ❄️☃️ (as far as we can tell)

results.name: kalonia
results.description: A forest found in the drifting plane of Shandalar.

results.name: kamehameha
results.description: Art evocative of the signature Dragon Ball Z move.

results.name: kamelion (android)
results.description: A shapeshifting robot who was originally intended to be a companion for the Fifth Doctor, but mostly ended up being sidelined because the BBC didn't have the budget for shapeshifting robots.

results.name: kami floating object
results.description: Small objects or motes floating around kami and those blessed by them.

results.name: kamigawa (origin)
results.description: Characters, objects and races from the plane of Kamigawa

results.name: kanna
results.description: Grandmother to Katara and Sokka, probably better known as "Gran-Gran."

results.name: karametra
results.description: God of the harvests, depicted alongside a sable, her companion.

results.name: karfell
results.description: One of the ten realms of Kaldheim, land of draugrs.
